name_cn:
Replica Miu Miu
Extended Wrist Strap: 5BB117: MiuMiu New Bowling Bag, made of top-grade imported calfskin, smooth and soft leather, cotton satin lining. This bag is cool, capturing a refined multifunctional design that blends men's and women's elements, casual and lazy, natural and free-spirited, full of personality. Oversized capacity yet lightweight, simple yet not simplistic, almost everyone has one among fashion bloggers. Dimensions: 34X23X12cm (with original packaging)
